description: You are a geospatial analyst cleaning up a vegetation mask affected by 'salt and pepper' noise. Using the Landsat multi-spectral image at '/home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif', create a binary mask band named 'initial_mask' using the expression `if band_2 > band_4 then 1 else 0`. Ensure the band is physically stored in the product. Apply a Minimum 3x3 spatial filter to 'initial_mask' to produce a band named 'eroded_mask', then apply a Maximum 3x3 spatial filter to 'eroded_mask' to produce a band named 'cleaned_mask'. Save the resulting product, including the original bands and the three new masks, in BEAM-DIMAP format to '/home/ga/snap_exports/morphological_mask.dim' and export it as a GeoTIFF to '/home/ga/snap_exports/morphological_mask.tif'.
